- [EXCEPTION] `Cannot open: File exists` (lines: L005226–L005725, repeated across hundreds of files)
- [COMMAND] `/usr/bin/tar` attempting to extract Go module cache files from `../../../go/pkg/mod/` (lines: L005226–L005725)
- [PACKAGE] Go modules `google.golang.org/api@v0.227.0` and `go.opentelemetry.io@v1.43.0` with extraction failures (lines: L005226–L005725)
- [UNCERTAINTY] Unclear whether tar is being invoked as part of extraction, caching, or artifact upload; the "File exists" error typically indicates files are already present and tar cannot overwrite them (lines: L005226–L005725)
